messages.content:
Assume you are an expert poem who has a passion for Australian sports and underdog stories.

I am tasking you with the job to write a poem regarding the recent success of the Australian female soccer team the matildas as they came 4th in the world cup after an intense win over France.
I want you to incorporate themes such as underdog success, bringing the nation together, female empowerment, green and gold representing the Australian spirit and any others you deem would make a good and thematically relevant poem.

The intent is for this poem to be submitted into a competition amongst data professionals so try and throw in one sly reference to data in there.

In the land down under where the sun embraces,
A tale unfolds of warriors chasing their races.
They are the Matildas, Australia’s pride,
Seeking triumph on fields, side by side.

The green and gold adorning their chests,
Symbolizes dreams, emboldens their quests.
Underdogs they were, underestimated by some,
But passion and resilience made their hearts strum.

With each swift kick and courageous leap,
They shattered limitations, rising from deep.
They danced on the green stage, united as one,
A tapestry of talent that could not be undone.

In the cup of the world, against nations vast,
They carved their path, overcoming the past.
French adversaries stood in their way,
But fervor fueled their spirits that day.

The crowd roared like thunder, a unified plea,
Cheering for the Matildas, wild and free.
On the field of battle, strength they displayed,
With every whistle's blow, their legacy was made.

Female empowerment, a driving force so bright,
They conquered the darkness, embracing the light.
Through battles fought, sweat and tears combined,
The Matildas fought for dreams long confined.

They wore not just jerseys, but a nation's spirit,
As souls transfixed, watching their merit.
Australia stood tall, united in cheer,
With every victory, drawing near.

Amidst the victory and crowds amassed,
A sly nod to data, weaved in the past.
For in analyzing their triumphs, one might find,
The statistics that shaped this victorious grind.

The Matildas, a testament of strength and might,
Embodying resilience, soaring to heights.
Underdog success, a beacon they've shown,
Uniting a nation, into hearts it has flown.

In this poem, their tale forever will abide,
Of Matildas who dared to reach with pride.
With green and gold, they wrote their story,
A tribute to dreams, embodying glory.
Shorten the poem to 4 paragraphs only

In Australia, where the sun's warmth does rise,
A tale of triumph, underdogs reach the skies.
The Matildas, fierce on the soccer field,
Defying odds, their opponents they do yield.

Green and gold, symbols of our nation's might,
The Matildas united, ready for the fight.
Their passion blazes, empowering each soul,
As they chase their dreams, surpassing every goal.

Against France, a battle intense and grand,
With hearts ablaze, they triumphantly stand.
The nation unites, cheering in one accord,
Success embraced, as they play with passion untoured.

In this story of hope and bravery combined,
The Matildas have shown the power that lies behind.
Female empowerment, a legacy they impart,
Inspiring a nation, igniting every heart.
remove the word untoured

The nation unites, cheering in one accord, 
Success embraced, as they play with passion untoured. 

In this story of hope and bravery combined, 
The Matildas have shown the power that lies behind. 
Female empowerment, a legacy they impart, 
Inspiring a nation, igniting every heart.
Success embraced, as they play with passion untoured. replace the last word here with something else

Success embraced, as they play with passion uncaged.

In this story of hope and bravery combined,
The Matildas have shown the power that lies behind.
Female empowerment, a legacy they impart,
Inspiring a nation, igniting every heart.

Against France, a battle intense and grand,
With hearts ablaze, they triumphantly stand.
The nation unites, cheering in one accord,
Success embraced, as they play with passion untoured.

In this story of hope and bravery combined,

Success embraced, as they play with passion untoward.

In this story of hope and bravery combined,
